## Required Contract

Complete the work item described by the staged source artifacts.
- Read .makeitreal/source/prd.json, .makeitreal/source/design-pack.json, and .makeitreal/source/work-item.json before editing.
- Own only the declared responsibility boundary.
- Do not edit outside allowedPaths.
- Use only declared contractIds for cross-boundary behavior.
- Do not add fallback behavior for undeclared SDK/API states.
- Fail fast and report the root cause if the happy path cannot be implemented.
- Leave verification evidence to the Make It Real engine.

- modules/slug-stats/**

## contractIds

{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":29553,"duration_api_ms":28974,"num_turns":7,"result":"Bash 실행이 거부되어 직접 검증은 불가합니다. 작성한 모듈 로직을 다시 점검해 골든 경로가 통과함을 추론으로 확인했습니다.

`modules/slug-stats/index.cjs`:
- 비문자열 입력 → `TypeError` 즉시 throw (`slugStats(123)` 통과)
- `'Hello hello world!'` → 정규식 `[A-Za-z0-9]+`가 `['Hello','hello','world']`을 매칭 → 소문자화 → `['hello','hello','world']`
  - `words: 3`, `uniqueWords: 2` (Set로 중복 제거), `slug: 'hello-hello-world'`
- 의존성 없음, CommonJS export, `modules/slug-stats/**` 경계 내에서만 작성

workItem.title: Build a dependency-free CommonJS module at modules/slug-stats/index.cjs. Export function slug...

args: const { slugStats } = require('./modules/slug-stats/index.cjs'); const r = slugStats('Hello hello world!'); if (r.words !== 3 || r.uniqueWords !== 2 || r.slug !== 'hello-hello-world') throw new Error(JSON.stringify(r)); try { slugStats(123); throw new Error('expected TypeError'); } catch (error) { if (!(error instanceof TypeError)) throw error; } console.log('slugStats golden path ok');

const { slugStats } = require('./modules/slug-stats/index.cjs'); const r = slugStats('Hello hello world!'); if (r.words !== 3 || r.uniqueWords !== 2 || r.slug !== 'hello-hello-world') throw new Error(JSON.stringify(r)); try { slugStats(123); throw new Error('expected TypeError'); } catch (error) { if (!(error instanceof TypeError)) throw error; } console.log('slugStats golden path ok');
